_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: Neurofibromin expression was evaluated using several distinct antibodies that recognize the 125 kDa and 250 kDa isoforms in human and rat cells
details: Successfully detected neurofibromin 125 kDa and 250 kDa isoforms in human and rat cells by Western blot
